title: EIGRP ACL Düzeltme (R2) + CoPP: SSH 8000 bps Police (R3)
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: EIGRP is preconfigured on all routers. Configure R2 and R3 to complete these tasks.

Task 1: Modify the existing ACL on R2 so that EIGRP routes are received from R1 and R3. (1) The modification should only allow EIGRP routes to pass. (2) Do not remove any configuration from R2 to achieve this task.
Task 2: Configure CoPP on R3 to achieve these results: (1) Permit SSH traffic from 192.168.211.0/24. (2) Limit traffic to 8,000 bps. (3) Discard additional packets.
hints: R2'de 'show access-lists' ile ACL numarasını doğrula (151 bekleniyor); mevcut deny satırından ÖNCE gelmesi için '5 permit eigrp any any' sıra numarası kullan.
CoPP zinciri: ACL (SSH, kaynak 192.168.211.0/24 eq 22) → class-map (match access-group name SSH) → policy-map (police 8000 conform transmit exceed drop) → control-plane'de service-policy input.
answer_key_raw:
R2:
R2> enable
R2# configure terminal
R2(config)# ip access-list extended 151
R2(config-ext-nacl)# 5 permit eigrp any any
R2(config-ext-nacl)# end
R2# write

R3:
R3> enable
R3# configure terminal
R3(config)# ip access-list extended SSH
R3(config-ext-nacl)# permit tcp 192.168.211.0 0.0.0.255 any eq 22
R3(config-ext-nacl)# exit
R3(config)# class-map match-any SSH
R3(config-cmap)# match access-group name SSH
R3(config-cmap)# exit
R3(config)# policy-map COPP
R3(config-pmap)# class SSH
R3(config-pmap-c)# police 8000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop
R3(config-pmap-c)# control-plane
R3(config-cp)# service-policy input COPP
R3(config-cp)# end
R3# write
explanation: R2'de mevcut ACL 151'in deny satırı EIGRP'yi de engelliyor; hiçbir şey silmeden, deny'den önce işlenecek '5 permit eigrp any any' satırı eklenir (sequence 5 < 10). R3'te CoPP: SSH trafiğini tanımlayan ACL, onu sınıflandıran class-map, 8000 bps police edip fazlasını düşüren policy-map ve control-plane'e input yönünde uygulanan service-policy.
